OPPOSITION TO STEWART TITLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ETEMAD, CYRUS AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD, IF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, THE CREATION AND BREACH OF A CONTRACT WITH STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY, AND FOR THE BREACH BY STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY OF SOME FIDUCIARY DUTY OWED TO PLAINTIFF UNDER THE LAW. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND

REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF ITS DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY A TEXAS CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF CYRUS ETEMAD'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH A SPECIFIC CONTRACT FORMED ON A SPECIFIC WAY AND THE SUBSTANCE OF THE TERM OF SUCH CONTRACT AND HOW DEFENDANT BREACHED IT. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR# 8189 301/PJB
